name: Orange Dessert Ring with Fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the gelatin; stir until fully dissolved.
2. Measure the reserved apricot syrup and add enough cold water to total 1 cup. Stir in the syrup-water mixture and sweet white wine into the gelatin.
3. Pour the mixture into a 4-cup ring mold. Refrigerate until firm, at least 5 hours.
4. Mix the apricot halves and grapes. Cover and refrigerate.
5. Just before serving, dice the banana and stir it into the apricot halves and grapes.
6. Unmold the gelatin. Fill the center of the ring and garnish the side with fruit.
